mapper.select:
select customer_id as customerId, streamer_id as streamerId, nickname, profile_url as profileUrl, avatar_path as avatarPath, badge, merged_into_id as mergedIntoId, first_seen_date as firstSeenDate, last_seen_date as lastSeenDate from live_customer where merged_into_id is null
and nickname like concat('%', #{nickname}, '%')
and streamer_id = #{streamerId}
order by customer_id

select customer_id as customerId, streamer_id as streamerId, nickname, profile_url as profileUrl, avatar_path as avatarPath, badge, merged_into_id as mergedIntoId, first_seen_date as firstSeenDate, last_seen_date as lastSeenDate from live_customer where nickname = #{nickname} and streamer_id = #{streamerId} and merged_into_id is null
mapper.update: update live_gift_record set customer_id = #{newId} where customer_id = #{oldId}
update live_chat_contact set customer_id = #{newId} where customer_id = #{oldId}
update live_customer set merged_into_id = #{newId} where customer_id = #{oldId}
mapper.insert: insert into live_customer_alias (customer_id, nickname, source_type, first_seen_date, last_seen_date) values (#{customerId}, #{nickname}, #{sourceType}, (select first_seen_date from live_customer where customer_id = #{customerId}), (select last_seen_date from live_customer where customer_id = #{customerId}))
mapper.delete: delete from live_customer where customer_id = #{customerId} and merged_into_id is not null
